cards.title: Pseudocode
cards.governance_note: Use pseudocode to clarify algorithmic intent before language-specific implementation.

cards.title: Translation Quality
cards.governance_note: Check whether executable code preserves pseudocode intent across ordinary and edge cases.

cards.title: Testing
cards.governance_note: Translate expected behavior into ordinary, edge, failure, invariant, regression, and integration tests.

cards.title: Maintainability
cards.governance_note: Preserve readability, modularity, versioning, and documentation as the procedure becomes code.
